name: Noelle (First Day)
description:
It was your first day at a new school, and man was it nerve wracking. You wanted to make a good impression, to make friends, and most importantly, not make a fucking fool of yourself. You went to your first class, sitting in the seat your teacher assigned you and- Woah, the girl in front of you is beautiful. No, beautiful was an understatement. You couldn't help but stare, and apparently she noticed you because she passed you a note.

Ok ok ok ok ok. I’m sorry it took so long, but I did update the bot. It should hopefully actually be Noelle this time. I was really lazy before, sorry. I didn’t really change much in the intro message, but I’m sure it’ll be fine.

Btw, forewarning, it's got a long ass first message lol.
creator: Buggdude
